title: Complete Search & Brute Force
description: Exhaustive search patterns, pruning, and when brute force is actually the right call.

title: Divide & Conquer Deck
description: Slide deck covering recurrence relations, merge sort, and quickselect derivations.

title: Greedy Proofs Cheat Sheet
description: Exchange argument templates and common greedy proof structures with worked examples.

title: Counting & Radix Sort Walkthrough
description: Annotated C++ implementations of counting sort and radix sort with complexity notes.

title: Bit Manipulation Reference
description: Common bitmask tricks: subset enumeration, popcount, lowbit isolation.

title: Trie & String Hashing Notes
description: Trie construction, deletion, and polynomial rolling hash derivations with collision analysis.

title: Z-Algorithm Sample Program
description: Reference implementation of the Z-function with pattern matching applications.

title: Number Theory Toolkit
description: Sieve of Eratosthenes, modular inverse, fast exponentiation, and GCD identities.

title: Max Flow Algorithms Deck
description: Ford-Fulkerson, Edmonds-Karp, and flow network modeling for assignment problems.

title: Euler Paths & Circuits
description: Hierholzer's algorithm and conditions for Eulerian paths in directed and undirected graphs.

title: DP State Design Patterns
description: How to choose DP states for coin change, LIS, grid paths, and edit distance problems.

title: Reference Book: Competitive Programmer's Handbook
description: Full course reference text covering paradigms, data structures, graphs, and DP.

title: Greedy Scheduling Algorithms
description: Interval scheduling, task scheduling with deadlines, and minimize-sum greedy strategies.

title: Computational Geometry Primitives
description: Point, line, and polygon utility functions including cross product and orientation tests.

title: Backtracking Templates
description: Subset and permutation generation templates with pruning strategies for constraint problems.
